response.justification: Bogdan is a strong individual contributor with 15+ years of broad engineering experience and genuine developer tooling work (testing frameworks, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP tooling), but the role is fundamentally a people-leadership position requiring demonstrated people management experience. The resume contains zero evidence of direct reports, performance management, hiring, or team leadership beyond peer-level technical mentorship. All roles held are IC titles (Software Developer, Senior Software Developer, Staff Software Engineer), and the gap between a strong Staff IC and a Level II Engineering Manager is substantial and not bridgeable by technical depth alone.
strengths: Genuine developer tooling background: built testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), set up CI/CD infrastructure, and currently works on MCP code generators and agentic developer tooling
Broad technical seniority (15+ years) across web, mobile, embedded, and systems programming with a consistent pattern of Staff-level scope
Mobile platform exposure including shipping iOS and Apple TV apps, directly relevant to the mobile-platform ecosystem focus of this role
concerns: No evidence of people management whatsoever — no direct reports, no performance reviews, no hiring, no team growth narrative anywhere in the resume
No indication of strategic roadmap ownership, cross-team alignment, or organizational change leadership required at the L2 manager level
All roles are individual contributor positions; the jump to a full people-management role without any intermediate leadership experience (tech lead, EM, team lead) represents a very high-risk hire

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure depth
No evidence of org-level leadership or roadmap ownership
